---
title: "Research"
toc: false
listing: 
  type: table
  contents: posts
  fields: [Authors, title, ]
---

## **Publication**

-   Jae Seung Kang, Taesung Park, Youngmin Han, Seungyeon Lee, Heeju Lim, Hyeongseok Kim, Se Hyung Kim, Wooil Kwon, Sun-Whe Kim and Jin-Young Jang. (2019). Clinical validation of the 2017 international consensus guidelines on intraductal papillary mucinous neoplasm of the pancreas. Annals of Surgical Treatment and Research, 97(2), 58-64. [{{< fa download size=1x >}}](http://doi.org/10.4174/astr.2019.97.2.58)

-   Lee S, Lim H. Review of statistical methods for survival analysis using genomic data. Genomics Inform. 2019;17(4):e41. [{{< fa download size=1x >}}](https://doi.org/10.5808/GI.2019.17.4.e41)
